calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Continued To Dec-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jody Bryson appeared by zoom for Geoffrey King (administrator).

Mrs. Bryson stated that additional assets have been collected, that they collected retirement distributions in the amount of $120,000.00, that they are waiting for refund checks from the Internal Revenue Service in the amount of $12,777.00 and the Franchise Tax Board in the amount $2,600.00, that she will file a final inventory now that they know the amounts of those checks and that they were told it could take up to a year or more. Status on close of estate is continued to December 10, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Bryson that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration is to be filed by November 26, 2024, as well as the inventory and appraisal.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is set for hearing for the purpose of admitting the will with no appearance required. The Court notes that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated April 15, 2003 is admitted to probate. Geoffrey Winslow King is appointed the Administrator with Will Annexed of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. No bond is required. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on July 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Choi. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
